name: Unknown Process Name Observed
notes: This rule triggers when a process name is not in the list of known process names.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Profiled Process Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY Unknown Process Name Observed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND NOT when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of Profiled Process Names - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Detected An Unknown / Unseen Process (Based On The Process Name)
Event description: Detects any new unknown process based on the process name
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
